retry_reason: As a put wrapper, retrying after a successful release would cause a double-put (use-after-free). The release is unconditional and always valid at the point of call.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases the reference on the firmware object held by ab->fw.fw. After calling this function, the firmware pointer must not be dereferenced and no further release_firmware call should be made on it. It represents the end of the firmware's lifecycle in this context.
